title: helianthemum milleri var. eriocaulon
intro: Helianthemum milleri var. eriocaulon, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Helianthemum milleri var. eriocaulon can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
